card_description: Ikhnaton is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick proposes a "Brain Colony" or "Grain Brain" model of the universe, where individual humans are interconnected cells in a vast compound eye of the Immanent Mind."

linked_segments.summary: Dick proposes a "Brain Colony" or "Grain Brain" model of the universe, where individual humans are interconnected cells in a vast compound eye of the Immanent Mind. He explores the "male womb" of Zeus
linked_segments.title: U_Claudia_12.txt
